title: Ming Foundation RFC Ambiguity and Revision Register

ambiguities.title: Material assertion threshold
ambiguities.question: Which assertions are material enough to require the complete subject, speaker, evidence, purpose, and contestability record?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define impact and persistence criteria, including a safe default when materiality is uncertain.

ambiguities.title: High-impact use classification
ambiguities.question: What decisions or uses count as high impact, and who may classify them?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Add a minimum high-impact taxonomy and escalation rule.

ambiguities.title: Age, capacity, and representative authority
ambiguities.question: How should participation and representative authority vary by age, capacity, jurisdiction, safety, and service type?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define a jurisdiction-qualified participation profile and an independent review trigger.

ambiguities.title: Governed basis for intra-family disclosure
ambiguities.question: What minimum basis permits one family member's statement to be disclosed to another?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define disclosure bases, minimum-necessary rules, notice, safety exceptions, and appeal.

ambiguities.title: Processing-basis taxonomy
ambiguities.question: Which non-consent bases are recognized, and how are jurisdiction-specific legal bases represented without implying universal legality?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Separate technical basis categories from jurisdiction-specific legal qualification.

ambiguities.title: Representative authority verification
ambiguities.question: What proof and conflict checks are required when a requester acts for another person?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Add representative types, authority evidence, conflict handling, expiry, and independent review.

ambiguities.title: Minimum retention profiles
ambiguities.question: Which retention periods and backup-deletion timelines are acceptable for service, safety, audit, and evidence records?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Create reference retention profiles with jurisdiction and risk qualifiers.

ambiguities.title: Governed identity authority
ambiguities.question: Which system is authoritative when channel identities, permissions, or corrections conflict?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define reconciliation precedence, audit continuity, and unresolved-conflict behavior.

ambiguities.title: High-impact safety action threshold
ambiguities.question: Which actions are high impact, and what constitutes a named responsible role rather than a nominal queue?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define severity-to-accountability mapping and acknowledgment authority.

ambiguities.title: Least-intrusive decision standard
ambiguities.question: How should competing harms, uncertainty, urgency, and affected-person preference be compared?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Add a proportionality decision record and review examples.

ambiguities.title: Service availability and resource freshness
ambiguities.question: How are staffing promises, response targets, and local emergency-resource freshness verified?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define availability states, expiry, ownership, and stale-resource behavior.

ambiguities.source_section: 8. Special case: operator may be the risk source
ambiguities.title: Independent review trigger
ambiguities.question: Who can trigger and conduct independent review when the operator or institution may be causing harm?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define conflict triggers, interim access restrictions, reviewer independence, and appeal.

ambiguities.title: Reasonable informed person test
ambiguities.question: What review method and risk threshold operationalize the reasonable-informed-person re-identification test?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define attacker knowledge assumptions, review roles, and decision thresholds.

ambiguities.title: Minimum cohort and rare-pattern thresholds
ambiguities.question: What cohort and rarity controls apply at different sensitivity and publication levels?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Create risk-banded minimum cohort and suppression profiles.

ambiguities.title: Separate approval authority
ambiguities.question: Which role may authorize training, retrieval, evaluation, or prompt-example use, and what independent review is required?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define approval authority, provider controls, withdrawal lineage, and review expiry.

ambiguities.title: Withdrawal after aggregate publication
ambiguities.question: How should withdrawal affect derived datasets, rules, and previously published aggregates?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define lineage classes and when reanalysis, annotation, or withdrawal is required.

ambiguities.title: Material public claim threshold
ambiguities.question: Which public statements are material and require a claim record or capability-status label?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define materiality by audience, risk, reliance, persistence, and acquisition effect.

ambiguities.title: Bilingual semantic review
ambiguities.question: What evidence demonstrates that a translated Charter preserves governing meaning?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Add translation reviewer, source revision, semantic deviation record, and dispute route.

ambiguities.title: Release-blocking synchronization failures
ambiguities.question: Which pages and discrepancies must fail deployment rather than issue a warning?
ambiguities.recommended_resolution: Define normative page classes and fail, warn, or review behavior.
